comments.body:
Hello Team,

Order 3680 has a package weight of 551.69 lbs, for which the FedEx Freight LTL services — FedEx Freight Economy and FedEx Freight Priority — are configured under the automation setup rule.

However, the shipping rates for these two services are failing with the following error message: “The combination of freight line items and shipment special services exceeded limit. Please update and try again.”

Since the error message indicates that the shipment special services have exceeded the limit, I request that you please remove the special services and try processing the shipment again.

In this case, the special services enabled are Liftgate Delivery and Call Before Delivery, which are selected under: App > Settings > Carrier > FedEx 2
After removing the special services, please go to: App > Orders Page > Select Order > More Actions > Reprocess Order

Please let us know how it goes or if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

However, the shipping rates for these two services are failing with the following error message: “The combination of freight line items and shipment special services exceeded limit. Please update and try again.”
 
Since the error message indicates that the shipment special services have exceeded the limit, I request that you please remove the special services and try processing the shipment again.
 
In this case, the special services enabled are Liftgate Delivery and Call Before Delivery, which are selected under: App > Settings > Carrier > FedEx 2
After removing the special services, please go to: App > Orders Page > Select Order > More Actions > Reprocess Order
 
Please let us know how it goes or if you need any assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from the L3 team regarding the following case:

Case: FedEx LTL Freight rates failure with the message:
Error: _"Weight is missing for {0} line item. Please update and try again"_
Code: `LINEITEM.WEIGHT.REQUIRED`

Details:
This is a $29 Popular Plan CMSL customer using FedEx (REST) with Freight LTL configured for shipments over 150 lbs. However, shipping rates are failing for certain orders with the above error message.

For example, Order #3681 contains 129 quantities across 2 products, where the product weight is less than 0.5 lbs. I assume the issue is occurring because the minimum required weight is not being passed for individual line items in the rate request.

We had handled a similar case in the older Web Services API, but it appears this scenario is not currently handled in the new REST API implementation.

The customer sells both lightweight and heavyweight products, so there is a possibility of receiving mixed-product orders, making this an important scenario to support.

I have attached the rate request and response files for reference.

Could you please check and provide your input?

Store Details:
Store URL: 2af7c3-29.myshopify.com
Account ID: 9f128459-e8d5-45bf-bc7e-b18cf51d891c

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/33M7cJJ5bPJJRdtNR5wDlkpU3/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
Need assistance from the L3 team regarding the following case:
 
Case: FedEx LTL Freight rates failure with the message:
Error: "Weight is missing for {0} line item. Please update and try again"
Code: LINEITEM.WEIGHT.REQUIRED
 
Details:
This is a $29 Popular Plan CMSL customer using FedEx (REST) with Freight LTL configured for shipments over 150 lbs. However, shipping rates are failing for certain orders with the above error message.
 
For example, Order #3681 contains 129 quantities across 2 products, where the product weight is less than 0.5 lbs. I assume the issue is occurring because the minimum required weight is not being passed for individual line items in the rate request.
 
We had handled a similar case in the older Web Services API, but it appears this scenario is not currently handled in the new REST API implementation.
 
The customer sells both lightweight and heavyweight products, so there is a possibility of receiving mixed-product orders, making this an important scenario to support.
 
I have attached the rate request and response files for reference.
 
Could you please check and provide your input?
 
Store Details:
Store URL: 2af7c3-29.myshopify.com 
Account ID: 9f128459-e8d5-45bf-bc7e-b18cf51d891c

comments.body: Hello - do you have any updates?
comments.html_body: Hello - do you have any updates?
comments.plain_body: Hello - do you have any updates?

comments.body:
We have fixed the issue where freight rates were failing due to invalid weight value being passed, we have enhanced the app to pass minimum 0.5 lb weight, if product weight is less than minimum allowed value.

Also, FedEx has a limit of 15 line_items per Freight request, We will enhance this to split the order into multiple orders in such cases. This is a big change and will take some time.

Workaround:
1. Fulfill the orders outside the app where more than 15 line_items are added. (15 unique line_items, not 15 quantity)
2. For the time being they can mark few line_items as on hold and generate for 15 line_items and generate label for remaining product. -> If merchant is okay with this approach we can enable partial fulfillment.

[Veena]
comments.html_body:
We have fixed the issue where freight rates were failing due to invalid weight value being passed, we have enhanced the app to pass minimum 0.5 lb weight, if product weight is less than minimum allowed value.
 
Also, FedEx has a limit of 15 line_items per Freight request, We will enhance this to split the order into multiple orders in such cases. This is a big change and will take some time. 
 
Workaround:
  1. Fulfill the orders outside the app where more than 15 line_items are added. (15 unique line_items, not 15 quantity)
  2. For the time being they can mark few line_items as on hold and generate for 15 line_items and generate label for remaining product. -> If merchant is okay with this approach we can enable partial fulfillment.

    [Veena]

comments.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team has checked the case and observed 2 reasons for the FedEx Freight rates failure for the order 3681 -
1. Weight of some line items was less than 0.5 lbs, which was leading to error "_Weight is missing for {0} line item. Please update and try again_".
This error has now been resolved and the app will automatically pass the product weight as 0.5 lbs if it is less than this.

2. FedEx has a limit of 15 line_items per Freight request (unique line items not total quantity). As the order contains more than 15 line items in a single shipment request, the rates are failing with error "_The combination of freight line items and shipment special services exceeded limit. Please update and try again._"
To address this, we will be enhancing the app to split the orders into multiple order requests. As this is a big change, it will take some time to be made available.
To address this, we can offer the following workaround -
  - Fulfill the orders outside the app, where more than 15 line_items are added.
  - Alternatively, we can enable the partial fulfillment feature in the app on your store. To use this, you will have to first set additional line items (exceeding 15) to OnHold in Shopify. The app will sync the remaining line items for which you can generate the labels as usual and fulfill the order.
Once done, release the OnHold items in Shopify order. The released line items will sync in the app and you will be able to process them as usual.


Let us know if you would like to go with the 2nd workaround and we will enable the partial fulfillment feature for your store.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

  2. FedEx has a limit of 15 line_items per Freight request (unique line items not total quantity). As the order contains more than 15 line items in a single shipment request, the rates are failing with error "The combination of freight line items and shipment special services exceeded limit. Please update and try again."
    To address this, we will be enhancing the app to split the orders into multiple order requests. As this is a big change, it will take some time to be made available.
    To address this, we can offer the following workaround -
    • Fulfill the orders outside the app, where more than 15 line_items are added.
    • Alternatively, we can enable the partial fulfillment feature in the app on your store. To use this, you will have to first set additional line items (exceeding 15) to OnHold in Shopify. The app will sync the remaining line items for which you can generate the labels as usual and fulfill the order.
      Once done, release the OnHold items in Shopify order. The released line items will sync in the app and you will be able to process them as usual.
 
Let us know if you would like to go with the 2nd workaround and we will enable the partial fulfillment feature for your store.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello-
The line item limit on freight orders has never been a problem before. Has something changed?

I don't want to put anything on hold as our store integrates with DaVinci warehouse management system and I don't think orders will flow through.



I think I will wait for the fix. Do you know how long it will take?



Thanks,

Amy

comments.body:
Hello Amy,

Thank you for your response.

It seems like some things may have changed after the FedEx REST migration on FedEx end.

As of now, we do not have an exact ETA on the enhancement. However, as soon as we have an updated timeline, we will get back to you.

You can use the first workaround that we have suggested in the last response and process orders with 15+line items outside the app.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

As of now, we do not have an exact ETA on the enhancement. However, as soon as we have an updated timeline, we will get back to you.
 
You can use the first workaround that we have suggested in the last response and process orders with 15+line items outside the app.
 
Thanks and Regards,
